text.title: Lead Magnet for Solo Consultancy Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml. Always start at root-question; conclusions reference rule ids.

decision-tree.root-question: Do the AGENTS.md applicability preconditions hold for this case?

conclusion.verdict: run niche-positioning-for-solo-dev first; revisit after positioning ships
cut scope; methodology skipped if scope cannot fit 5 days

branch.when: icp_defined == true AND scope_days <= 5 AND format_candidates > 1

conclusion.verdict: score each candidate against rule; pick highest single-promise filter

branch.when: icp_defined == true AND scope_days <= 5 AND format_candidates == 1

conclusion.verdict: draft spec; verify magnet repels non-ICP; ship with follow-up wired

example.trace: icp_defined == true AND scope_days <= 5 AND format_candidates == 1 → conclusion ref="filters-not-collects" verdict="draft spec; verify magnet repels non-ICP; ship with follow-up wired"

text.example: Reading: evaluate the named observable; follow the matching branch; apply the rule the conclusion references.
